repair_history.diagnosis:
line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Data_Sink'.: Data_Sink is a port in component type Q, not visible in annex scope -> Remove the data flow assumption from component type annex
line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Q_Spg'.: Q_Spg is a subcomponent, not visible in component type annex -> Remove the data flow assumption from component type annex
line 66: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: Property reference not visible in component type annex -> Move dispatch protocol guarantee to implementation annex
line 67: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: Property reference not visible in component type annex -> Move execution period guarantee to implementation annex
line 68: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Deadline'.: Property reference not visible in component type annex -> Move deadline guarantee to implementation annex

line 79: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: AGREE guarantee statements in implementation annexes cannot reference component implementation properties directly -> Move the annex block to the component type Q
line 79: Guarantee statements are allowed only in component types: AGREE annex is placed in thread implementation instead of thread type -> Move the annex block to the component type Q
line 80: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: AGREE guarantee statements in implementation annexes cannot reference component implementation properties directly -> Move the annex block to the component type Q
line 80: Guarantee statements are allowed only in component types: AGREE annex is placed in thread implementation instead of thread type -> Move the annex block to the component type Q
line 81: Couldn't resolve reference to 'deadline'.: AGREE guarantee statements in implementation annexes cannot reference component implementation properties directly -> Move the annex block to the component type Q

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: AGREE annex references AADL properties by name, but the property names in the annex do not match the property names in the AADL model -> Change 'Dispatch_Protocol' to 'Dispatch_Protocol' in the guarantee statement
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: AGREE annex references AADL properties by name, but the property names in the annex do not match the property names in the AADL model -> Change 'Period' to 'Period' in the guarantee statement
Couldn't resolve reference to 'deadline'.: AGREE annex references AADL properties by name, but the property names in the annex do not match the property names in the AADL model -> Change 'deadline' to 'deadline' in the guarantee statement
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Priority'.: AGREE annex references AADL properties by name, but the property names in the annex do not match the property names in the AADL model -> Change 'Priority' to 'Priority' in the guarantee statement
extraneous input 'ms' expecting ';': AGREE uses 'ms' as a unit, but the AADL model uses 'Ms' for milliseconds -> Change '10ms' to '10 Ms' in the guarantee statement

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: AGREE annex is incorrectly referencing component implementation properties from component type scope -> Move the AGREE annex block from thread type Q to thread implementation Q.Impl
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Period'.: AGREE annex is incorrectly referencing component implementation properties from component type scope -> Move the AGREE annex block from thread type Q to thread implementation Q.Impl
Couldn't resolve reference to 'deadline'.: AGREE annex is incorrectly referencing component implementation properties from component type scope -> Move the AGREE annex block from thread type Q to thread implementation Q.Impl
Couldn't resolve reference to 'Priority'.: AGREE annex is incorrectly referencing component implementation properties from component type scope -> Move the AGREE annex block from thread type Q to thread implementation Q.Impl

Couldn't resolve reference to 'Dispatch_Protocol'.: AGREE guarantee statements in implementation annexes cannot reference component implementation properties directly -> Move the AGREE annex block from Q.Impl to Q (the component type)
Guarantee statements are allowed only in component types: AGREE guarantee statements are not permitted in thread implementation annexes -> Move the AGREE annex block from Q.Impl to Q (the component type)
named thing must be an expression with a type: AGREE cannot resolve property references in implementation annex -> Move the AGREE annex block from Q.Impl to Q (the component type)
no viable alternative at input 'Sporadic': AGREE cannot parse property references in implementation annex -> Move the AGREE annex block from Q.Impl to Q (the component type)
extraneous input 'Ms' expecting ';': AGREE cannot parse property value syntax in implementation annex -> Move the AGREE annex block from Q.Impl to Q (the component type)
